insight: Master Bot struggles against Lucina in sets where a Fuge (Fuguede?) is available — a slower Fuge line was tested and lost to Master Bot's Tarsiers and Polywalls, suggesting MB plays Tarsier/Polywall aggressively in those sets. This was noted as an anecdotal observation, not a systematic exploit.
author: amalloy
context: amalloy mentions testing a slower Fuge line against Master Bot and losing to its Tarsier/Polywall play.
